component.name: PulseForge
component.summary: Native Linux audio enhancement app for PipeWire

description.p: PulseForge is a lightweight Qt Widgets desktop app for Linux audio enhancement on PipeWire systems. It creates a virtual audio sink, captures that monitor stream, processes it in PulseForge's own C++ DSP engine, and plays the result through the selected real output device.
The v0.1 alpha includes device selection, live presets, an equalizer, limiter/compressor protection, tray support, and user-level systemd start-on-login integration.

screenshot.caption: PulseForge main window with equalizer and enhancement controls

description.p: Initial alpha release prepared for AppImage testing on Fedora and Bazzite.
